name: golang-github-shurcool-sanitized-anchor-name-dev
title: golang-github-shurcool-sanitized-anchor-name-dev
summary: Go package for creating sanitized anchor names
description:
Go package for creating sanitized anchor names
sanitized_anchor_name provides a Go function to create sanitized anchor names.
.
Its logic can be reused by multiple packages to create interoperable
anchor names and links to those anchors.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-shurcool-sanitized-anchor-name-dev because Go package for creating sanitized anchor names.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-shurcool-sanitized-anchor-name-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-shurcool-sanitized-anchor-name-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-shurcool-sanitized-anchor-name-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
